headline: Today's top AI story: Broadcom, Apple Extend Chips Partnership to 2031
bullets: Broadcom, Apple Extend Chips Partnership to 2031
Tencent releases Hy3 open-source model that allegedly matches models up to five times its active size
Major medical device manufacturer notifies nearly 4 million of breach
Got my Ascent GX10 two days ago, ran REAP-pruned NVFP4 DeepSeek-V4-Flash on a single Spark, and it stays consistent at long context
